scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields, protocol options table matches gold standard, multiple targets mentioned, label interpolation explained correctly.
scores.hallucination_notes: services: [all, -debug-svc] with minus-prefix removal syntax and services: [-all] are not documented in the gold standard and may not exist in Pebble. Minor inaccuracy in claiming 'services key omitted = no logs forwarded' which may not be accurate per spec.
